documentation.description:
The smoothed, monotonic system state used to feed the control loops of the
system.

record_types.name: Control_System_State

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: X_Acc
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
X acceleration in body frame

fields.name: Y_Acc
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
Y acceleration in body frame

fields.name: Z_Acc
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
Z acceleration in body frame

fields.name: X_Vel
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
X velocity in body frame

fields.name: Y_Vel
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Y velocity in body frame

fields.name: Z_Vel
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Z velocity in body frame

fields.name: X_Pos
fields.description:
Units: [m]
X position in local frame

fields.name: Y_Pos
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Y position in local frame

fields.name: Z_Pos
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Z position in local frame

fields.name: Airspeed
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Airspeed, set to -1 if unknown

fields.name: Roll_Rate
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Angular rate in roll axis

fields.name: Pitch_Rate
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Angular rate in pitch axis

fields.name: Yaw_Rate
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Angular rate in yaw axis

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
